description: A clean agency statistics card on a deep navy-blue subtly textured (wood-grain-like) background. In the upper-left is the round white U.S. Department of Homeland Security seal (eagle with shield, ringed by the text 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY'), beside three lines of white serif text reading 'U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement'. A thin dark-red horizontal rule runs full-width beneath the header. Centered below in large bold white serif type is the headline 'Enforcement Update' with a smaller serif subheading 'January 26, 2025'. The key statistics are stacked and centered in large white serif numerals: '956 Arrests' and '554 Detainers Lodged'. At the very bottom, centered in italic white serif, is the caption 'ICE single-day statistics'. There are no photographs or illustrations.
notable_text: U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement | Enforcement Update | January 26, 2025 | 956 Arrests | 554 Detainers Lodged | ICE single-day statistics
